findings.title: Ukraine war persists without major positional shifts
findings.summary: Ongoing fighting in Ukraine contributes over 40% of global conflict events with no reported breakthroughs. This maintains I2 military posture at baseline levels. No new deployments or operations noted in the coverage window.
findings.claim_excerpt: The wars in Ukraine and Palestine continued to drive the level of violence, contributing over 40% of conflict events in the past 12 months.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Prolonged stalemate risks accidental escalation but no trajectory change.
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple institutional sources confirm ongoing high violence without shifts.

sources_cited.excerpt: Ukraine and Palestine continued to drive over 40% of conflict events.
Russia-Ukraine conflict persists with no conclusive victory.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: ACLED and S&P align on persistence; no ISW daily due to date but baseline holds.

findings.review_reason: Monitor for potential spring offensive signals

findings.title: Gaza displacement and hunger crisis deepens
findings.summary: Over 2 million displaced in Gaza with total dependence on aid amid trapped population. I6 displacement velocity remains critically high despite any ceasefire mentions. Humanitarian access constraints exacerbate crisis.
findings.claim_excerpt: Over 70,000 Gazans killed and over 2 million displaced; people trapped within borders.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Sustained humanitarian collapse signals worsening trajectory without aid surge.
findings.confidence_basis: Corroborated by ACLED and Statista on ongoing deadliness.

sources_cited.excerpt: Over 2 million displaced in Gaza, fully aid dependent.
Palestine third-most-deadly despite Gaza ceasefire drop in deaths.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: WFP and ACLED confirm scale; fragile ceasefire per Statista.

findings.title: Sudan civil war deadliness outranks Gaza
findings.summary: Sudan conflict since 2023 shows highest civilian toll with collapsed systems and spread fighting. I2 military posture escalates via nationwide diffusion. Humanitarian access remains severely limited.
findings.claim_excerpt: Civil wars in Myanmar and Sudan continued at high levels; Sudan outranks Palestine in deadliness.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Under-covered theatre with accelerating violence risks regional spillover.

sources_cited.excerpt: Sudan civil war at high levels, outranks Palestine in deadliness.
Sudan civil war highest civilian death toll recently.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Tier 1 ACLED leads; systematic under-coverage noted.

findings.title: Myanmar civil war fragmentation at record levels
findings.summary: Myanmar hosts most fragmented conflict with over 1,200 armed groups active. I2 posture stable at high intensity across theatre. Civil war drives top global violence rankings.
findings.claim_excerpt: Myanmar is the most fragmented conflict with over 1,200 armed groups.

sources_cited.excerpt: Civil wars in Myanmar at high levels.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Dual ACLED sources; under-covered per mandate.

findings.title: Haiti gang violence increasingly deadly to civilians
findings.summary: Haiti gang crisis worsens with over 4,500 political violence deaths and rising civilian targeting. I2 posture escalates in lethality and civilian impact. Status shifts to more dangerous.
findings.claim_excerpt: Haiti became more deadly; over 4,500 killed, targeted civilian violence increased.

sources_cited.excerpt: Haiti more deadly to civilians, 4,500+ killed.

findings.title: Sahel violent extremism continues worsening
findings.summary: Violent extremism in Sahel arc (Mali incl.) shows worsening trend per trackers. I2 military posture escalates via transnational spread. Impacts multiple states including Mali.
findings.claim_excerpt: Violent Extremism in the Sahel: Worsening.
findings.confidence_basis: Single primary source in results; CFR authoritative.

sources_cited.excerpt: Gang violence drives top conflicts including Sahel-linked.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: CFR worsening status; ACLED supports via index.

below_threshold.title: DRC Eastern Conflict ongoing Hutu militia activity
below_threshold.reason_excluded: No new escalation in coverage window; historical context only

theatre_summary.russia_ukraine: Protracted war drives global violence levels without reported shifts.
theatre_summary.gaza: Fragile ceasefire holds amid massive displacement and aid dependence.
theatre_summary.sudan: Civil war escalates in deadliness with nationwide collapse.
theatre_summary.myanmar: Most fragmented conflict persists at high intensity.
theatre_summary.drc: Eastern conflict simmers with historical militia tensions.
theatre_summary.iran: Regional tensions stable; no new signals in results.
